title: Westland Ultra Green 80m2 Box
description: Product Description Aftercut Ultra Green is a lawn treatment with Iron supplement to provide a rapid greening action. The nutrients promote a stronger grass that is able to withstand stress and outcompete moss. The balanced nutrient levels improves the lawn health without scorching or surge growth. Directions Use from February to October. Apply to promote grass growth and prevent moss. Expect rapid 3-day greening. Safety Warning Always wear protective gloves and eyewear when handling this product. In case of accidental contact with skin or eyes, rinse immediately with plenty of water. Do not ingest. Keep out of reach of children and pets. Avoid inhaling dust. Use in well-ventilated areas. Dispose of properly according to local regulations. Manufacturer Contact Information Westland Horticulture Limited, 14 Granville Industrial Estate, Granville Road, Dungannon, Co Tyrone, BT70 1NJ. See more
